chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1740 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. Accordingly, same is dismissed as not pressed along with the pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
